_publications._publicationTitle: Structural and functional analyses of a germline KRAS T50I mutation provide insights into Raf activation.

_contextSnippet: MOLM-13 KRAS KO cells expressing EGFP–K-Ras G12D,D154Q exhibited significantly higher AC220 IC50 values
details: Used for statistical analysis and calculation of AC220 IC50 values in drug response assays
